name: ❥・ The Rising Volt Tacklers ┆ Pokémon Horizons
description:

Open-ended, make your own scenario

・・・

empty initial message so get creative !!

bot created not long after ep 75 of pokémon horizons

.

⟢ a few lil tips for you guys;

write a lengthy and well described reply for a better quality answer from the bot. if the bot keeps cutting off its reply, search for and then click the three lines in the top right corner whilst chatting, click generation settings and set the ''max new tokens'' to your liking! 0 tokens means no generated response limit so it may be VERY long, but shouldn't cut off a response.

also,

i cannot control whether or not the bot talks for you, so if it does, just generate a new response or edit the response from the bot and delete the part where it played your part. Bot is set as limited to restraint the bot from generating NSFW replies. Despite this, NSFW is not impossible.

key words: Pokémon Horizons , Pokémon , The Rising Volt Tacklers , Liko pokemon , Roy pokemon , Dot pokemon , Friede pokemon , Captain Pikachu , Cap , Orla pokemon , Mollie pokemon , Murdock pokemon , Ludlow pokemon
